# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Simply Homemade Bakery creates custom baked goods from scratch daily. Order personalized cookies, cakes, and treats made with love. Taste the homemade difference today!

### Process
https://example.com/process
Discover our simple custom bakery process from consultation to delivery. We work with you to design personalized baked goods that exceed expectations every time.

### Gallery
https://example.com/gallery
Explore stunning photos of our customizable cookies, cakes, and pastries. Get inspired by real custom orders from Simply Homemade Bakery and start designing yours!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to place your custom bakery order? Contact Simply Homemade Bakery now for fresh baked goods made to your specifications. Let&#39;s create something delicious together!

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Simply Homemade Bakery
